problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Polymer. Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
